UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2002, DEFAULT PROVE UP ON CALENDAR IN SCD 218 ON JULY 16, 2002, AT 9:00 A.M.. GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER PURSUANT TO COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; PATRICK HEARD, CSR AND P. DIAS, CT. CLERK.
